sources.introductionYear: Announced April 2022; Indiegogo campaign launched May 2022 (newsshooter.com) (tier-5)
sources.imageCircleMm: cf.sirui.com: 44mm image circle (tier-1); newsshooter reports 'up to 43mm' — using official value
sources.isParfocal: sirui.com: 'parfocal design ensures unchanged focus while zooming' (tier-1 explicit claim)
sources.hasFocusBreathing: siruishop.de: 'No visible focus shift occurs' (tier-1 explicit claim)
sources.hasFrontRotation: Not stated on Sirui product page

lenses.description: A full-frame parfocal cine zoom from Sirui covering a practical wide-to-short-telephoto range at a constant T3.2. Built for full-frame and larger sensors, it holds focus through the zoom with well-contained breathing, and leans toward a softer, gently vintage rendering with pleasing rounded bokeh, all in a solid all-metal body.
